# OWNER/OPERATORS

> Music project. New single: *Echoes and Static*, out May 8, 2026. From the LP *LOSS LEADER*.

## API

- [API](https://owneroperators.online/api/): Live Node API — primary machine-readable endpoint for this site.

## Pages

- [Home](https://owneroperators.online/): Release info, links, intro
- [Manual](https://owneroperators.online/manual/): Operating Manual — voice, values, context
- [FAQ](https://owneroperators.online/faq/): Frequently asked questions
- [Loss Leader](https://owneroperators.online/lossleader/): LP page
- [Preview](https://owneroperators.online/preview/): Preview

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://owneroperators.online/llms-full.txt)
